what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for an image asset named p-3 in the design-source channel under landing-mockups; it stores identifiers, a blob reference, MIME type, provenance, and a short source label.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, name, w/h, source, author_session, created, and empty links
mime is image/jpeg and blob is blob://b2:4fef02de37a17dd808ae0d974e649203
source is design_source_material and author_session is ch-3mpkjg3r
body text labels it as 'SOURCE design ground-truth — landing-mockups/p-3.jpg'
standouts: w and h are 0 despite being an image record
marked explicitly as SOURCE design ground-truth
blob reference is present but no inline image or preview
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a fixed set of ledger fields
Includes an address URI and blob reference for asset location
Provides created timestamp and author session for provenance
concerns: Image dimensions are 0, suggesting missing or uncomputed metadata
links array is empty, so no relationships are declared
No alt text, caption, or description of the image content
notes: A metadata stub for a design-source landing-mockup JPEG that records identity and provenance but lacks image dimensions and descriptive content.
questions: Why are width and height 0 for an image asset?
What visual content does landing-mockups/p-3.jpg contain?
How is this asset related to other landing-mockup images?
Is the blob reference resolvable and current?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to serve as SOURCE design ground-truth for a landing-mockup image; actual content is a metadata record with missing dimensions and minimal description, so it partially matches.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to register a landing-mockup image from the design source as a ground-truth asset so the ledger can reference and locate it.
contribution: Provides a stable id, address, and blob mapping plus creation provenance for landing-mockups/p-3.jpg that a fused system can use to locate and reference the image asset.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata file for the JPEG image landing-mockups/p-3 in the design-source channel, including a blob reference, author session, creation timestamp, and zero width/height values.
intention_for_embedding: To record and expose a design-source ground-truth landing-mockup image asset for cataloging and downstream reference.
